login.welcomeDescription: Sign in to manage your cash book, accounts, reports, and daily business activity.
login.secureAccessDescription: Your account is protected by encrypted authentication.
login.signInDescription: Enter your username and password to access the system.
login.contactAdmin: Contact your administrator to reset your password.
login.enterCredentials: Enter your username and password to continue.
login.noSessionReturned: Sign-in succeeded but no session was returned. Please try again.
login.noSessionToken: Could not retrieve session token from Neon Auth.
login.neonAuthError: Neon Auth error. Please try again.
